caption: Several soccer players in dark blue jerseys and bright green shorts and socks are running across a green grass field in a large stadium. The stadium's red seating is visible in the background, featuring large white logos and advertisements. Legible text on the banners includes "CAJA RURAL GRANADA", "PULEVA", "WINAMAX", and "Liga Santander". In the sequence, the players move from left to right across the pitch. Some players are seen from the back, while others are captured mid-stride. As the action progresses, the group of players shifts their positions, continuing their run toward the right side of the frame. The lighting is bright and even, suggesting an outdoor setting during the day or under strong stadium lights. The players remain focused on their movement, with no direct interactions between them visible in the frames.
